newTicket.subject: Unable to renew my device subscription
newTicket.description: When I try to renew my subscription for Samsung Galaxy S24, the payment page shows an error 'Transaction failed'. I have tried both UPI and Cash options. My subscription expires in 3 days.

followUpMessage: Hi, is there any update? My subscription expires tomorrow and I need to renew urgently.
resolvedReply: Thanks for resolving! But I have one more question about the renewal period.
